text:
Group Type | 
| CCNS | List of CMS Certification Numbers (Facility Numbers) for the Practice | 
| ADDRESS_LINE_1 | Practice's Address (line 1) | 
| ADDRESS_LINE_2 | Practice's Address (line 2) | 
| CITY | Practice's City | 
| STATE | Practice's State (postal abbreviation) | 
| ZIP_CODE | Practice's Zip Code | 
| INSERT_DATE | Date the Record was Created | 
| UPDATE_DATE | Date the Record was Modified | 
| IS_ACTIVE | Active Practice (Y) or Inactive Practice (N) | 
| FILE_COUNT | Number of Files
